traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: 60 ft.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs. poison; resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.description: Proficiency with battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, warhammer.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.description: One artisan's tool: smith, brewer, or mason.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Add double proficiency on History checks related to stonework.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: +1 max HP per level.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.description: Proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: 60 ft.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: Proficiency in Perception.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs. charmed; magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: 4 hours of meditation = 8 hours of sleep.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: Proficiency with longsword, shortsword, longbow, shortbow.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.description: One wizard cantrip; Intelligence is the spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: One additional language of your choice.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: Proficiency with longsword, shortsword, longbow, shortbow.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.description: Speed increases to 35 ft.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.description: Hide when only lightly obscured by natural phenomena.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: Disadvantage on attacks and Perception in direct sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.description: Dancing lights cantrip; faerie fire at level 3; darkness at level 5.

traits.name: Drow Weapon Training
traits.description: Proficiency with rapier, shortsword, hand crossbow.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: Reroll natural 1s on attack rolls, ability checks, and saves.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs. frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: Move through the space of any creature larger than you.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: Hide behind a creature one size larger than you.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs. poison; resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a dragon ancestry; determines breath weapon damage type and resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: Action: 15-ft cone or 30-ft line; targets make a save (DC 8 + Con + prof); 2d6 damage at level 1, scaling with level. Recharges on short/long rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: Resistance to the damage type of your draconic ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: 60 ft.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: Advantage on Int, Wis, Cha saves vs. magic.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.description: Minor illusion cantrip; Intelligence is the spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.description: Communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: Double proficiency on History checks related to magical, alchemical, or technological items.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description: Proficiency with tinker's tools; build small clockwork devices.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: 60 ft.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs. charmed; magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: Proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: 60 ft.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.description: Proficiency in Intimidation.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead. Once per long rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.description: On a melee crit, roll one extra weapon damage die.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: 60 ft.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.description: Resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.description: Thaumaturgy cantrip; hellish rebuke at level 3; darkness at level 5. Charisma is the spellcasting ability.
